title: m-dev-tools doc frontmatter
description: Validation contract for the YAML frontmatter block at the top of every prose document under any repo's docs/ tree. Sibling of recipe.schema.json (for docs/recipes/*.md) and repo.meta.schema.json (for dist/repo.meta.json). Two variants gated on the `generated` field: prose docs (require doc_type+lifecycle+the git-derived trio) and generator-emitted docs (only `generated: true` + drift markers — see docs-discoverability-spec.md §5.1).

created.description: ISO date of the file's first git commit. Tooling-populated from `git log --follow`; never hand-edited.

last_modified.description: ISO date of the file's latest git commit. Tooling-populated; never hand-edited.

revisions.description: Number of commits touching this file. Tooling-populated; never hand-edited.

doc_type.description: One or more entries from the 23-type vocabulary. Combinations are allowed and meaningful (see spec §4 refactor heuristics).

lifecycle.description: Lifecycle state. Default for the org-wide backfill: `active`.

title.description: Human-readable title. Optional but strongly encouraged for catalog rendering.

owner.description: GitHub handle of the accountable owner. Defaults to the repo's top contributor when omitted.

connections.description: 0–3 connection types from the 6-vocab. Optional in Phase 1.

replaces.description: Paths to other docs this one supersedes. If A says `replaces: [B]`, B must say `superseded_by: A` (Phase 3 bidirectional check).

supersedes.description: Alias of `replaces`. Pick one per doc.

superseded_by.description: Path to the doc that retired this one.

related.description: Paths to related docs. Not a supersession claim.

freeze_after.description: Date after which this doc's lifecycle should flip to `frozen` (e.g., release plans at GA).

review_after.description: Date after which this doc surfaces in the freshness report. Phase 3 cron honors this.

generated.description: Explicit `false` is accepted but redundant — absence implies prose.
Marks this doc as generator-emitted. See docs-discoverability-spec.md §5.1: docs-QA CI skips all prose checks for these and asserts only path-declaration + drift-vs-generator.

last_modified.description: Date of the generator run that wrote this file. Drift gate (Phase 1 check #5) compares against the source manifest's `verified_on`.
